title: SoulSpeedHarness
description: SoulSpeedHarness is a Paper plugin for Minecraft 1.21.10 that enables Soul Speed enchantment on Happy Ghast harnesses, increasing their flying speed by 40%, 80%, or 120% based on enchantment level.
body:
# SoulSpeedHarness

A Paper plugin that enables Soul Speed enchantment on Happy Ghast harnesses, significantly increasing their flying speed.

## What This Plugin Does

SoulSpeedHarness allows you to enchant Happy Ghast harnesses (saddles) with the Soul Speed enchantment, which boosts the flying speed of Happy Ghasts when ridden. The speed increase scales with the enchantment level:

- **Soul Speed I**: 40% faster flying speed
- **Soul Speed II**: 80% faster flying speed
- **Soul Speed III**: 120% faster flying speed

The plugin automatically detects when a player mounts a Happy Ghast with an enchanted harness and applies the speed modifier. The effect is removed when the player dismounts.

## Why Download This Plugin

If you want to make Happy Ghast travel faster and more efficient in your Minecraft server, this plugin provides a simple and balanced way to do so. The Soul Speed enchantment adds strategic value to harnesses, making them more than just a requirement for riding - they become a customizable speed upgrade.

The plugin is lightweight, uses modern Paper API features, and includes automatic cleanup to prevent performance issues.

## Important Information

- **Server-side only**: This is a Paper/Spigot plugin that must be installed on your server
- **Compatible with**: Paper 1.21.10 and compatible versions
- **Works with**: All 16 harness color variants (Black, Blue, Brown, Cyan, Gray, Green, Light Blue, Light Gray, Lime, Magenta, Orange, Pink, Purple, Red, White, Yellow)
- **Performance**: Event-based system with periodic updates (every 5 ticks) for optimal performance

## How to Use

1. Obtain a Soul Speed enchanted book (e.g., through bartering with Piglins)
2. Use an anvil to enchant a harness with Soul Speed
3. Place the enchanted harness on a Happy Ghast
4. Ride the Happy Ghast - it will fly significantly faster!

The speed boost is automatically applied when you mount the Happy Ghast and removed when you dismount.
